title: Factory state machine enforcement
objective: Harden lifecycle phase transitions and prevent illegal command ordering.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Define allowed transitions empty -> planning-scaffolded -> planning-frozen -> factory-ready -> runnable.
factory bootstrap fails unless phase is planning-frozen.
run fails unless phase is factory-ready or runnable.
State updates are deterministic and include hashes when relevant.

koObjective: planning-scaffolded → planning-frozen → factory-ready 같은 상태 전이를 코드로 강제한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
